governanceClosureCommit: this report is committed by the P1G governance closure commit
implementationSummary: Added a constrained production API client and mappers for auth, competition list/groups/rounds/pairings, and finished replay game info.
Added Pinia auth state and persistence boundaries for login, logout, stored session restore, and URL session handoff cleanup.
Installed TanStack Vue Query as the server-state owner and routed product pages through it.
Added sanitized workspace handoff storage and replay loading into the canonical board/PGN workspace.
Preserved project constraints: no React, no tests, no mock product data, no generic /CALL, no proxyRequest runtime usage, no MQTT publish/live credential runtime.

apiBoundaryDecision.directProductionEndpointEvidence: curl POST https://wxapi.kaisaile.org/liveproxy/GetActList returned real production rows.
apiBoundaryDecision.directBrowserEvidence: Temporary production build direct browser fetch to https://wxapi.kaisaile.org/liveproxy/GetActList failed CORS because Access-Control-Allow-Origin was empty.
apiBoundaryDecision.resultingDecision: Runtime defaults to same-origin /api/ksl while allowing approved HTTPS production override. Browser validation used a temporary local /api/ksl proxy to the real upstream.

residualRisks: Production hosting must provide the same-origin /api/ksl boundary or set an approved HTTPS production API base that permits browser reads.
Successful login and authenticated protected replay were not run because no owner credentials were available in this task.
MQTT/live streaming remains intentionally closed pending owner-approved read-only transport and credential boundary.
Compatibility match/share/cloud resolvers are represented as sanitized handoffs and truthful unavailable workspace states until resolver contracts are supplied.
